summary: ENVELOPE: All 4 fields match (change_type=feature, architectural_flag=false, doctrine_version=2.8.0, work_packet_id FK valid). SCOPE: modified_paths=['migrations/2026-02-24-lcs-spine-v0-skeleton.sql'] is subset of allowed_paths=['migrations/']. No protected assets touched. EXECUTION: All 6 WP acceptance criteria verified — lcs schema created, 3 enums, 4 tables (movement_type_registry with 10 seed rows, cid_intake, sid_registry, mid_ledger), 10 FKs to outreach.outreach + cl.company_identity + internal tables, 5 immutability/forward-only triggers, 2 callable functions (fn_process_cid, fn_finalize_dispatch), 9 indexes, transaction-wrapped, no dropped view references. CS payload accurately reflects built objects. ADVISORY (non-blocking): (1) Dispatch state enforcement allows skipping intermediate states (MINTED->DELIVERED) — acceptable if intentional flexibility, flag if strict sequential required. (2) 4 new lcs.* tables need CTB registry registration via follow-up work packet. (3) RLS not enabled on new tables — follow-up needed per production hardening standards.
